TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Will_Blalock, title = Will_Blalock, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Will_Blalock} }

S.FORM: == Will Blalock == Will Blalock sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, Will Blalock, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.8 teng. min 1.1 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'.(2006–2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

== Will Blalock == Will Blalock sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1983, ryax sa tay 8 nqu tay 9, Will Blalock, squliq na p'unro. pincyuwagan nya' plpgun ingalan nya' tinsu' minxal ga 1.8 teng. min 1.1 zningat nya' mari'zik na ttkran mari'.(2006–2007) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: == will βlaloʦ~ʨk == will βlaloʦ~ʨk s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, will βlaloʦ~ʨk, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan njaʔ plpɣun iŋalan njaʔ tins~ɕuʔ minxal ɣa *.* teŋ. min *.* zniŋat njaʔ mariʔzik na ttkran mariʔ.(*********) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
